song.title: A Debtor To Mercy Alone
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) A debtor to mercy alone, Of covenant mercy I sing; Nor fear, with God’s righteousness on, My person and off’ring to bring.|| The terrors of law and of God With me can have nothing to do; My Savior’s obedience and blood Hide all my transgressions from view.
[V2] 2) The work which His goodness began, The arm of His strength will complete; His promise is Yea and Amen, And never was forfeited yet.|| Things future, nor things that are now, Not all things below or above, Can make Him His purpose forego Or sever my soul from His love.
[V3] 3) My name from the palms of His hands Eternity will not erase; Impressed on His heart, it remains In marks of indelible grace.|| Yes! I to the end shall endure, As sure as the earnest is giv’n; More happy, but not more secure, The glorified spirits in heav’n.
song.author: Augustus M. Toplady
